title: “It’s no coincidence that California’s budget deficit and Gavin Newsom’s disapproval numbers hit an all-time high on the same day.”
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: California's budget deficit has reached $68 billion.
Gavin Newsom's disapproval numbers have hit an all-time high.
Democrats' fiscal mismanagement has contributed to California's budget deficit.
In the last five years, California's spending has increased by more than 60%.
The increase in spending in California is described as unsustainable.
Californians' quality of life has collapsed.
People are moving from California to Florida.
